accuracy.name: 准确性 (Accuracy)
accuracy.description: 技术概念描述准确，事实无误，示例可运行

scoring.excellent: 所有技术细节准确，示例完整可运行
scoring.good: 主要概念准确，minor 错误不影响理解
scoring.fair: 存在明显事实错误，需要修正
scoring.poor: 核心技术概念有误，无法作为学习材料

clarity.name: 清晰度 (Clarity)
clarity.description: 表达简洁精准，逻辑清晰，层次分明

scoring.excellent: 30秒能抓住核心，层层递进无冗余

structure.name: 结构性 (Structure)
structure.description: 模板选择合适，章节安排合理

scoring.excellent: 完美匹配主题类型的最佳结构
scoring.good: 结构合理，有轻微改进空间

visual.name: 可视化 (Visual)
visual.description: 图表适当，样式一致，辅助理解

scoring.excellent: 图表精准辅助理解，一图一意，样式统一
scoring.good: 有适当图表，样式基本一致
scoring.fair: 图表过多/过少或样式混乱
scoring.poor: 无图表或图表错误百出

humanity.name: 人性化 (Humanity)
humanity.description: 无 AI 味，自然流畅，有观点（权重提升）

scoring.excellent: 像资深专家写的，有洞见，无 AI 痕迹，句子节奏丰富
scoring.good: 基本自然，轻微 AI 味，有1-2处改进空间
scoring.fair: 有明显 AI 写作特征，如'此外'、'值得注意的是'等
scoring.poor: 充满 AI 味，无法阅读，公式化严重

evals.prompt: 帮我深入学习 React Fiber 架构，整理成一篇完整的学习文章。要包含它的核心原理、为什么要设计 Fiber、时间切片和优先级调度是怎么工作的。
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive Markdown article about React Fiber with: clear explanation of the problem (old reconciler limitations), core concepts (Fiber nodes, work loop, priorities), visual diagrams showing the reconciliation process, and practical implications. Should have natural, human-like writing style with NO AI phrases like '此外' or '值得注意的是'.

evals.prompt: 我想了解区块链的共识机制，请研究后写一篇学习笔记。要解释什么是共识机制、为什么需要它、PoW 和 PoS 的区别，以及还有其他什么共识算法。
evals.expected_output: A well-structured Markdown article explaining blockchain consensus: 30-second mental model with analogy, clear distinction between different mechanisms, comparison table, and visual diagrams showing how consensus works. Must read like written by a knowledgeable human, NOT an AI.

evals.prompt: 研究一下 TCP 三次握手的过程，然后整理成一篇入门指南。要适合初学者理解，用简单的语言和图示来解释。
evals.expected_output: A beginner-friendly guide to TCP three-way handshake with: step-by-step breakdown, clear diagrams showing packet flow, analogy to help understanding, common questions answered. Should be approachable, conversational, and well-visualized. NO AI writing patterns.

evals.prompt: 帮我对比分析不同的数据库索引类型：B-Tree、Hash、Bitmap、GiST 等。要说明每种索引适合什么场景，优缺点是什么。
evals.expected_output: A comparative analysis article with: overview table of index types, deep dive into each type, clear comparison of use cases, visual diagrams showing index structures, practical recommendations. Must have: varied sentence lengths, active voice, human insights, NO filler phrases like '此外' or '值得注意的是'.

evals.prompt: 我想了解 JavaScript 模块系统的发展历程，从早期的全局变量到 CommonJS、AMD、ES Modules。请整理成一篇有历史感的文章。
evals.expected_output: An evolutionary history article with: timeline of module system development, key figures and turning points, code examples from each era, explanation of why each system emerged, modern impact and best practices. Should read like a compelling story told by an expert, not a textbook summary.

evals.prompt: 写一篇关于闭包（Closure）的技术文章。要求：1) 语言自然，像人在说话不是机器 2) 避免所有 AI 写作特征（此外、值得注意的是、不仅...而且...） 3) 有个人洞见和观点 4) 句子长短交替，有节奏感
evals.expected_output: A technical article about JavaScript closures that: 1) reads naturally like written by a senior developer, 2) contains NO AI patterns ('此外', '值得注意的是', '不仅...而且...'), 3) has personal insights and opinions, 4) varies sentence length and rhythm. This tests humanity dimension specifically.
evals.notes: 专门测试人性化写作能力的用例
